generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture during AGREE annex insertion
Insert AGREE annex blocks into target component or implementation scopes
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use valid component type and implementation scopes for AGREE assumptions and guarantees
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
anti_patterns: Avoid using subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
irrelevant_topics: AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables
